# Abhishek Adhikari — Portfolio
> Agritech entrepreneur, SEO consultant, and community builder from Hetauda, Nepal

## Core pages
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/ — Home: portfolio overview, key metrics, skills, experience, projects, certifications, blog, recommendations, contact
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/about — About: background in agritech, community building, and digital growth
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/work — Projects: 12 digital products built across agriculture, SEO, coffee, and business sectors
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/blog — Blog: articles on design trends, agritech Nepal, React performance, content strategy, user research, no-code development
- https://abhishekadhikari.com/contact — Contact form and social links

## Key facts
- Founded Himalaya Krishi: scaled Murrah buffalo livestock from 25 to 220+ head
- Co-founded DEV Community Nepal: organized 100+ virtual events and 10+ physical meetups
- Built Hashtag Web Solutions: SEO consulting for 10+ clients, built 100+ SEO tools
- Deputy Community Builder at Coding Olympics Nepal: reached 16+ colleges
- Contributed 12 agentic skills to Antigravity Awesome Skills (40k+ stars, 1,541+ skills)
- Google UX Design Professional Certificate holder
- Google Digital Marketing certified
- Based in Hetauda, Bagmati Province, Nepal

## Social profiles
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/whoisabhishekadhikari/
- GitHub: https://github.com/WHOISABHISHEKADHIKARI
